nodes.context: Birmingham-based gang originally of British Pakistani members, founded in the 1970s to protect the British Pakistani community from White power skinheads.
A group of white supremacist skinheads that the Lynx Gang was formed to protect against.

edges.evidence_quote: The Lynx Gang ... was founded in the 1970s, initially to protect the British Pakistani community ... from White power skinheads.
edges.context: The Lynx Gang was formed to oppose and protect against White power skinheads.
